incidents.summary: Auth-service Errors Cause Cascading Failures Across Orders and Payments
incidents.root_cause: H3: The major version upgrade of payments-service (v1.8.0) caused a cascading failure in orders and payments services.

incidents.summary: Auth-Service Error and Cascading Failures on 2026-04-10
incidents.root_cause: payments-service v2.0.0: Updated payment gateway integration

recurring_patterns: Dependency failure: gateway->auth token introspection timeout
Kafka dependency failure while publishing order event (escalating impact)
Auth dependency failure: redis session store unreachable (escalating impact)
Order event processing delay observed (post-14:00 degradation)
Dependency failure: gateway->payments upstream closed connection
Inventory service returned stale data (post-14:00 degradation)
Dependency failure: orders->payments RPC connection reset
Dependency failure: orders->payments status lookup failed
PSP dependency returned 502 for charge request
Dependency failure: gateway->payments upstream closed connection (escalating impact)
Auth cache nearing eviction threshold (post-14:00 degradation)
Payment idempotency lock wait detected (post-14:00 degradation)
Retrying PSP call due to elevated latency (post-14:00 degradation)
